name: Banana-Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, blending well after each addition. Stir in the mashed bananas.
4. Add the dry ingredients all at once, stirring just enough to moisten. Gently mix in the chopped nuts.
5. Spoon the batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling them about two-thirds full.
6. Bake in a 350 degree F. oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with homemade jam or jelly.
